backend/main.mo: Motoko actor managing per-player game state (health, ammunition, score, enemies defeated) with functions to start a game, take damage, recharge weapons, increase score, defeat enemies, and query state.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking a single feature (extending the Bond-style gun barrel loading animation duration) to its implementation file and associated components/test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing each component, hook, and style file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes including background, foreground, border, chart, and sidebar color variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app titled 'Timeless', mounting the app into a root div and loading the TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component wrapping a lazily loaded Game component in an ErrorBoundary and Suspense, using InitialLoadingScreen as the loading fallback.
frontend/src/components/Arena.tsx: 3D arena component that loads a skybox texture, creates physics-based floor/walls/obstacles, renders enemies, and fires onArenaLoaded and onEnemiesSpawned callbacks when ready.
frontend/src/components/CanvasErrorFallb: Fallback UI displayed when the WebGL canvas fails to initialize, showing an error message, possible causes, and retry/reload buttons with Bond styling.
frontend/src/components/Enemy.tsx: Individual enemy component using shared geometry/material for performance, a physics box collider, userData set for raycast hit detection, and a dynamic health bar above the mesh.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React class-based error boundary that catches render errors, releases pointer lock, and displays a Bond-styled error card with optional stack trace and a reload button.
frontend/src/components/Game.tsx: Main game component that orchestrates the 3D scene using React Three Fiber and Cannon physics, managing initialization stages, enemy state, audio, and delegating to Arena, Player, and HUD components.
frontend/src/components/HealthBar.tsx: Simple presentational component that renders a percentage-based health bar using CSS classes.
frontend/src/components/HUD.tsx: Heads-up display overlay showing score, health bar, ammunition count with pips, and a music control panel with mute toggle.
frontend/src/components/InitialLoadingSc: Full-screen Bond-themed loading screen with a minimum display time of 4.5 seconds, animated progress bar, scan-line overlay, and corner accent decorations.
frontend/src/components/LoadingScreen.ts: In-game loading overlay that displays stage labels, a progress bar, retry count, and an error state with a retry button.
frontend/src/components/MuzzleFlash.tsx: Three.js mesh component that renders a textured muzzle flash sprite in front of the camera and fades it out over successive frames.
frontend/src/components/PerformanceOverl: Development-only overlay that displays FPS, frame time, and JS heap memory stats using the usePerformanceMonitor hook.
frontend/src/components/Player.tsx: First-person player component using a Cannon physics sphere, handling movement, mouse-based shooting with raycasting for enemy hit detection, and muzzle flash display.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor, using the current Internet Identity for authenticated or anonymous access, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBackgroundMusic.ts: React hook that manages procedurally generated background music using the Web Audio API, supporting two tracks ('diehard' and 'bond') with mute toggling and automatic track switching based on game state.
frontend/src/hooks/useDependencyCheck.ts: React hook that asynchronously verifies required dependencies (WebGL, Three.js, React Three Fiber, Cannon physics) are available, returning loading/ready/error state with a 10-second timeout.
frontend/src/hooks/useEnemies.ts: React hook that manages a list of 5 enemies with positions and health, exposing a `damageEnemy` callback that updates health and tracks destruction state.
frontend/src/hooks/useGameInitialization: React hook that orchestrates a multi-stage game initialization sequence (canvas, physics, arena, player, enemies), tracking progress and handling timeouts and retries up to a configurable maximum.
frontend/src/hooks/useGameState.ts: React hook that manages local game state (health, ammo, score, enemies defeated) and syncs it with a backend via query/mutation hooks, exposing actions like damage, enemy defeat, and ammo decrement.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React hook and context provider that wraps the DFINITY AuthClient to handle Internet Identity login, logout, and identity persistence, exposing login status and identity to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/usePerformanceMonitor: A React hook that measures and reports FPS, frame time, and JS heap memory stats using requestAnimationFrame, active only in development mode.
frontend/src/hooks/usePlayerControls.ts: A React hook that tracks WASD/Space keyboard input and mouse movement via event listeners, exposing current control state and a consumable mouse delta getter.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: A React Query hook that fetches game state for a given player and exposes mutations for startGame, takeDamage, defeatEnemy, increaseScore, and rechargeWeapon via the canister actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useWeapon.ts: A React hook managing weapon firing logic with a configurable fire rate, muzzle flash timer, and cleanup of state and timers on unmount.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS entry point that imports the game theme and Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind layers, and defines a dark James Bond–inspired black/charcoal/gold CSS variable palette.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/styles/game-theme.css: Defines the James Bond/Die Hard visual theme including keyframe animations (barrel spin, muzzle flash, HUD flicker), and styled component classes for the gun barrel loader, HUD panels, and loading card.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending the default theme with the project's CSS variable–based color palette, serif/mono font families, zero border-radius, gold box shadows, and the tailwindcss-animate plugin.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking the current version (8), existing features, and a pending feature request to extend the 007 gun barrel loading animation duration.
